intro: The most concrete split between Lago and Maxio is the pricing model: Lago runs on freemium with paid plans from $1, while Maxio uses subscription from $100. That shapes how predictable your monthly spend is and how much of the cost sits in infrastructure versus per-seat or per-event fees. Beyond the headline, Lago carries low lock-in (open-source billing, self-hostable) and freemium with paid plans from $1; Maxio carries medium lock-in (billing data exportable) and subscription from $100. Lago is a fit when you are saas. Maxio is a fit when you are saas. The honest trade-off: Lago is explicitly not for simple projects; Maxio is explicitly not for simple projects. On the product side, Lago is described as Open-source metering and usage-based billing API supporting flat, tiered, volume, and percentage pricing models, and Maxio is described as Subscription and revenue management platform for B2B SaaS combining billing, revenue recognition, and financial metrics.
quick_take: Lago is for saas; Maxio is for saas; decide on pricing model.
verdict_a: Choose Lago if you need a free tier to start before committing budget, and your use case matches saas.
verdict_b: Choose Maxio if its subscription pricing model fits your budget shape better than Lago's freemium model, and you are saas.

faq.a: Lago starts at $1; Maxio starts at $100. On entry price alone that is the comparison, but real cost scales with users, events or volume, which the entry prices do not capture. Check each vendor's full tier list before committing.

faq.q: Can I migrate from Lago to Maxio?
faq.a: Migration from Lago to Maxio is plausible because Lago has low lock-in (open-source billing, self-hostable). You would still have to map config, permissions and integrations to Maxio's model. Plan for dual-run and rollback.

Both tools tie at 4/5 for developer experience on our scoring. The real difference will show up in your specific workflow, not the headline rating. A one-hour spike on both is the fastest way to decide.

faq.q: Is Maxio a good alternative to Lago?
faq.a: Maxio targets the same best-fit audience as Lago (saas). Note that Maxio is explicitly not for simple projects, so it only replaces Lago if you are outside that exclusion. The lock-in profile differs (low vs medium), which is the main thing to weigh.
